---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for GradeFlow
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

What feature would you like to see? Describe it in detail:

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

- Teacher benefit: ?
- Student benefit: ?
- Parent benefit: ?
- School benefit: ?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe:

- User flow: What steps would a user take?
- UI changes: Any new pages, buttons, forms?
- Data changes: Any new data fields?
- Integrations: Does it need external services?

## Example Scenario

Describe a real use case:

> As a [teacher/student/admin], I want to [action] so that [benefit].

For example:

> As a teacher, I want to generate quarter-term rankings Report so that I can submit to the principal.

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered other approaches? Describe any alternatives:

## Priority

- [ ] Nice to have (low priority)
- [ ] Important (medium priority)
- [ ] Critical / Blocking workflow (high priority)

## Phase

Which phase should this go in?

- [ ] Phase 2 (current)
- [ ] Phase 3 (cloud sync, Q2-Q3 2026)
- [ ] Phase 4 (intelligence features)
- [ ] Backlog (future, TBD)

## Dependencies

Does this require:

- [ ] Backend changes (Phase 3+ with Supabase)
- [ ] New external integration?
- [ ] Database changes?
- [ ] UI redesign?

## Additional Context

- Screenshots or mockups?
- Competition research?
- User feedback?
- Related issues?

---

**Before submitting**:

- [ ] I checked the [ROADMAP.md](../docs/ROADMAP.md)
- [ ] I searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This isn't a bug (use bug_report.md instead)
- [ ] I provided a clear use case

---

Thanks for helping GradeFlow improve! 🎓
